reviewNotes.scope: Server-side: error-classifier.ts, sse-helpers.ts, improve-routes.ts, api-routes.ts (generate-evals), skill-create-routes.ts. Client-side: ErrorCard.tsx, ProgressLog.tsx, AiEditBar.tsx, SkillImprovePanel.tsx, CreateSkillPage.tsx, WorkspaceContext.tsx, workspaceTypes.ts, workspaceReducer.ts, types.ts

suppressedFindings.note: ErrorCard countdown useEffect dependency array uses expression (countdown != null && countdown > 0) instead of individual values -- functionally works since countdown state change triggers re-render anyway, React hooks lint suppressed explicitly

SkillImprovePanel and CreateSkillPage use manual ReadableStream SSE parsing instead of the shared useSSE hook -- intentional design choice per plan.md AD-07 to keep local state management simpler for standalone components

TIMEOUT_PATTERNS includes /abort/i which could overlap with user-initiated AbortError -- server-side classifyError receives actual LLM errors not AbortErrors since those are caught at the fetch level before reaching classifyError
